mapper.select: SELECT id, record_no, admission_id, patient_id, amount, type, balance_after, remark, created_at FROM prepaid_records WHERE admission_id = #{admissionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prepaid_records (record_no, admission_id, patient_id, amount, type, balance_after, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{recordNo}, #{admissionId}, #{patientId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{balanceAfter}, #{remark}, NOW())
